content.problemStatement:
Given an array **A** consisting of **N** integers - **A1, A2....AN**. You have to find the value of 
**Σ MAX(i,j) * F(i,j)** where **1 ≤ i < j ≤ N**.



  **MAX(i,j)** is defined as **max(Ai,Ai+1...Aj)**.


**F(i,j)** is defined as: 



  **F(i,j)** will be 1 if **(Ai&Aj) = Aj** or **(Ai&Aj) = Ai**
  
   ** F(i,j)** will be 0, otherwise.
    
  **&**
content.inputFormat: The first line of input will consist of an integer N. The next line of input will consist of N integers A1, A2....AN.
content.outputFormat: The value of the expression Σ MAX(i,j) * F(i,j) where 1 ≤ i < j ≤ N.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The value of F(i, j) will be 1 for (1, 2), (1, 3), (2, 3), (2, 5), (3, 4), (3, 5). Therefore, the answer will be MAX(1, 2) + MAX(1, 3) + MAX(2, 3) + MAX(2, 5) + MAX(3, 4) + MAX(3, 5) = 38.
The value of F(i, j) will be 1 for (1, 2), (1, 3), (2, 3). Therefore, the answer will be MAX(1, 2) + MAX(1, 3) + MAX(2, 3) = 12.
The value of F(i, j) will be 1 for (1, 2), (1, 3), (1, 4), (2, 3), (2, 4), (3, 4). Therefore, the answer will be MAX(1, 2) + MAX(1, 3) + MAX(1, 4) + MAX(2, 3) + MAX(2, 4) + MAX(3, 4) = 20.

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we will iterate over all pairs of indices (i, j) where 1 ≤ i < j ≤ N. For each pair, we will calculate MAX(i, j) which is the maximum value in the subarray from index i to j. We will also calculate F(i, j) which is 1 if (Ai & Aj) equals Ai or Aj, and 0 otherwise. We will then multiply MAX(i, j) with F(i, j) and add it to our running sum.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N^2) — because we are iterating over all pairs of indices (i, j) where 1 ≤ i < j ≤ N. For each pair, we are calculating MAX(i, j) which takes O(N) time in the worst case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) — because we are only using a constant amount of space to store our variables.

code.Python3:
import sys
N = int(sys.stdin.readline())
A = list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split()))
sum = 0
for i in range(N):
    for j in range(i + 1, N):
        maxVal = max(A[i:j + 1])
        f = (A[i] & A[j]) == A[i] or (A[i] & A[j]) == A[j]
        sum += maxVal * f
print(sum)
